title: Tracked Out Modpack
description: The Official Modpack for the Tracked Out server so you can play Decked Out 1 & 2
body:
# The Official Tracked Out Modpack

Have you ever wanted to play Decked Out 1 or 2 in the same sort of environment that the Hermits played in?

Have you wanted to immerse yourself into the mystery and awe that captured you when you first saw the Deep Frost Citadel from Decked Out 2 or the Dungeon from Decked Out 1?

The Tracked Out Modpack and Server can supply that and more!

<details>
<summary>Mod List</summary>

## Main Mods
- Simple Voice Chat
- Status
- Customizable Player Models

## Performance/QOL Mods
- Sodium
- ImmediatelyFast
- More Chat History
- Reese's Sodium Options
- The Open Sauce Toast Killer
- Exordium
- AppleSkin
- Starlight
- Dynamic FPS
- Entity Culling
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
- Dynamic Crosshair
- Krypton
- Lithium 
- LazyDFU
- ModernFix
- No Chat Reports
- FerriteCore
- Spell Checker
- Controlling
- LambDynamicLights
- Not Enough Crashes
- Auth Me

## Miscellaneous Mods
- OptiGUI
- Better Ping Display
- Simple Discord RPC
- Load My Resources
- FancyMenu
- Audio Extension for FancyMenu
- Drippy Loading Screen
- Your Options Shall Be Respected
- bad packets
- Mod Menu
- Zoomify
- Customizable Player Models Simple Voice Chat compat
- Replay Voice Chat

## Libraries
- YetAnotherConfigLib
- ClothConfigApi
- Auudio
- Resourceful Lib
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- Konkrete
- CraterLib
- Fabric API
- MidnightLib
- Searchables
- Forge Config API Port

</details>

## Info about this Modpack

This modpack is made specifically for the Tracked Out Server.

The server is open! You can join the Discord server to be updated, or follow us [@trackedoutmc](https://twitter.com/trackedoutmc) on Twitter or [@trackedout](https://www.tumblr.com/trackedoutmc) on Tumblr

[![Join the Discord Server](https://inv.wtf/widget/trackedout)](https://inv.wtf/trackedout)
